value.found_quote: Optional fields such as `nickname_candidates`, `model`, `model_reasoning_effort`, `sandbox_mode`, `mcp_servers`, and `skills.config` inherit from the parent session when you omit them.
value.rationale: The page describes a per-agent `model_reasoning_effort` field, with examples using values "high" and "medium" (e.g. reviewer.toml sets `model_reasoning_effort = "high"` and pr-explorer.toml sets `model_reasoning_effort = "medium"`). This substantiates the claim that reasoning effort can be configured per agent. Low is a standard value in the same set; high and medium are shown verbatim.
